name: netty
description: Netty and Reactor Netty skills for building high-performance network applications with non-blocking I/O
author: ririnto

interface.shortDescription: Netty and Reactor Netty network application guidance
interface.longDescription: Skills for building high-performance network applications with Netty (core API) and Reactor Netty (reactive wrapper). Covers bootstrap, channels, pipelines, codecs, ByteBuf, TCP/UDP/HTTP/WebSocket servers and clients, and reactive HTTP/TCP/UDP with Project Reactor integration.
defaultPrompt: How do I create a Netty TCP server?
How do I write a custom codec in Netty?
How do I build an HTTP server with Reactor Netty?
